# Strength Journeys

> Free, privacy-first barbell lifting analysis tools. Connect your Google Sheet training log and get visual insights, strength benchmarks, and PR tracking. No data stored server-side.

## Core Tools

- [One Rep Max Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator): Estimate your 1RM using 7 proven formulas (Epley, Brzycki, Mayhew, Wathan, McGlothin, Lombardi, O'Conner). Includes rep-max projection tables, percentage-based training guides, and strength level ratings by age, sex, and bodyweight.
- [Strength Percentile Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/how-strong-am-i): Compare your lifts across four population groups, from general population to competitive powerlifters, adjusted for age, sex, and bodyweight.
- [Strength Standards and Levels](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/strength-levels): Personalized strength benchmarks for the big four barbell lifts (squat, bench press, deadlift, strict press) by bodyweight, age, and sex.
- [Warm Up Sets Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/warm-up-sets-calculator): Generate warm-up set progressions for any working weight.
- [1000lb Club Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/1000lb-club-calculator): Check if your squat, bench, and deadlift total qualifies for the 1000lb club and other milestone clubs.
- [Strength Club Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/200-300-400-500-strength-club-calculator): Track progress toward single-lift milestone clubs (200/300/400/500 lb).
- [Plate Milestones](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/plate-milestones): Track progress toward iconic plate-loading milestones.

## Tracking and Visualization (requires Google Sheet connection)

- [Session Logger](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/log): Log sets directly to your Google Sheet from the browser.
- [Lift Explorer](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/lift-explorer): Browse and search your full lifting history.
- [Strength Visualizer](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/visualizer): Interactive charts of your estimated 1RM trends over time.
- [Tonnage Tracker](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/tonnage): Weekly and monthly training volume analysis.
- [Strength Year in Review](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/strength-year-in-review): Annual recap of PRs, consistency, and milestones.
- [Import Data](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/import): Import lifting history from Strong, Hevy, BTWB, or Wodify.

## Other Tools

- [AI Lifting Assistant](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/ai-lifting-assistant): AI-powered chat for strength training questions.
- [Gym Timer](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/timer): Configurable rest timer with audio alerts.
- [Gym Playlist Leaderboard](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/gym-playlist-leaderboard): Community-ranked gym music playlists.
- [How Strong Is a Gorilla?](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/how-strong-is-a-gorilla): Fun comparison of human vs gorilla strength.

## Lift-Specific Calculators

- [Squat 1RM Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/squat-one-rep-max-calculator)
- [Bench Press 1RM Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/bench-press-one-rep-max-calculator)
- [Deadlift 1RM Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/deadlift-one-rep-max-calculator)
- [Strict Press 1RM Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/strict-press-one-rep-max-calculator)

## Formula-Specific Calculators

- [Epley Formula Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/epley-one-rep-max-formula)
- [Brzycki Formula Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/brzycki-one-rep-max-formula)
- [Mayhew Formula Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/mayhew-one-rep-max-formula)
- [Wathan Formula Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/wathan-one-rep-max-formula)
- [McGlothin Formula Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/mcglothin-one-rep-max-formula)
- [Lombardi Formula Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/lombardi-one-rep-max-formula)
- [O'Conner Formula Calculator](https://www.strengthjourneys.xyz/calculator/oconner-one-rep-max-formula)
